description: RLMetrics entity template — Reinforcement learning performance metrics for a single skill/model combination, used for adaptive routing via EMA-weighted success rates and UCB1 exploration scores
_comment_skill_name: Name of the skill being tracked. MUST match a registered skill in the plugin's skills/ directory or .claude/skill-index.json.
_comment_model_name: AI model used during skill execution. Tracks per-model performance for model selection optimization (Principle XIV).
_comment_success_rate: Exponential Moving Average (EMA) of success outcomes. Range: [0.0, 1.0]. Initialized at 0.5 (neutral prior). Updated after each invocation via EMA algorithm.
_comment_selection_weight: Routing weight derived from success_rate. Range: [0.1, 1.0]. Clamped to prevent any skill from being completely excluded. Higher = more likely to be selected.
_comment_invocation_count: Total number of times this skill+model combination has been invoked. Monotonically increasing. Used in UCB1 exploration bonus calculation.
_comment_avg_tokens: Running average of tokens consumed per invocation. Updated via cumulative moving average: new_avg = old_avg + (new_tokens - old_avg) / invocation_count.
_comment_avg_duration_ms: Running average of execution duration in milliseconds per invocation. Updated via cumulative moving average: new_avg = old_avg + (new_duration - old_avg) / invocation_count.
_comment_last_feedback: Most recent feedback entry. Null if never invoked. Snapshot of latest outcome for quick access without scanning history.
_comment_ema_alpha: Learning rate for Exponential Moving Average. Range: (0.0, 1.0). Default: 0.1. Lower = more stable (favors historical performance). Higher = more reactive (favors recent outcomes).
_comment_history: Ordered array of feedback entries (oldest first). Each entry records one invocation outcome. Used for audit trail and offline analysis. May be truncated to last N entries for storage efficiency.

per_task_type._comment: Breakdown of metrics by task type (tactic vs strategy). Enables scope-aware routing decisions. Each sub-object mirrors the top-level metric structure.

tactic._comment: Metrics for tactic-scope tasks (small, focused changes). Tactic tasks typically consume fewer tokens and complete faster.

strategy._comment: Metrics for strategy-scope tasks (large, cross-cutting changes). Strategy tasks typically consume more tokens and require more iterations.

_ema_update_algorithm._comment: Exponential Moving Average (EMA) update — called after each skill invocation to update success_rate and selection_weight
steps: 3. Compute: new_rate = (1 - ema_alpha) * success_rate + ema_alpha * outcome
7. Update avg_tokens via cumulative moving average
8. Update avg_duration_ms via cumulative moving average
11. Update per_task_type sub-metrics for the relevant task type

_ucb1_algorithm._comment: Upper Confidence Bound 1 (UCB1) — used for exploration/exploitation balancing when selecting skills. Skills with fewer invocations get a higher exploration bonus.
notes: total_invocations_all_skills = sum of invocation_count across all tracked skills
If invocation_count == 0, ucb1_score = Infinity (always explore untried skills)
The sqrt term decays as invocation_count grows, favoring exploitation of known-good skills
UCB1 is used alongside selection_weight for routing decisions

_cumulative_moving_average._comment: Used for avg_tokens and avg_duration_ms updates

_validation_rules: ema_alpha MUST be in range (0.0, 1.0) exclusive
history array length SHOULD be <= invocation_count
last_feedback MUST be null when invocation_count == 0
last_feedback MUST NOT be null when invocation_count > 0
Each history entry MUST have timestamp (ISO8601), outcome (success|failure), tokens (integer >= 0), duration_ms (integer >= 0)

_integration_points.skill_index: .claude/skill-index.json — selection_weight synced here for framework-wide routing
